---
title: "Project Plan"
date: "April 02, 2026"
categories: "Final Project"
---
## Overview
Submit a project plan that outlines the project deliverables, comprising three main sections: 

### Section One: Background  
Provide an overview of your community case study, including:

- Environmental justice theme (e.g., water, climate, food, etc.)
- Community case study-- which community have you chosen, and why might it be a good representation of this EJ theme? 
- At least three peer-reviewed citations related to your community case study's background and EJ challenge, to ensure your background section provides enough context for your case study.
- Which theoretical concepts are likely to apply to this case study?

### Section Two: Analysis Plan
Provide an overview of your anticipated analysis plan, including: 

- Data analysis plan: 
    - What data source(s) will you use? 
    - Will your data need to be manipulated at all in preparation for your data visualizations? 
    - Two intended data visuals 
- Logic model development: 
    - What potential intervention might you propose?
    - What potential partner organizations might you propose? 


### Section Three: Research Process 
Provide an overview of how you will realize your interdisciplinary research plan: 

- Is there anything you're currently unsure about, that might cause your project plan to change?
- How can I support you to realize your plan?

## Grading
The project plan is worth 10% of your grade. 

## Submission 
 Please submit your project plan to Brightspace by Thursday, April 02, 2026 at 11:59 PM.
